uncertainties.read: field-split Schedule A sheet — wide Amount-of-Income + Transaction-Summary matrix
uncertainties.note: Trust header 'M&R Trust Partnership'. This sheet shows the wide 'Amount of Income' matrix (12 buckets) plus a far-right Transaction-Summary block (3 cols, headers degraded ~'P / M / PN'). Owner column reads 'SP' for all rows. Value grid and Type-of-Income block are off-sheet. Per-cell amount buckets and transaction marks are NULLED: the 29-row matrix cannot be reliably column-aligned at this scan degradation. Asset names on this page were near-illegible and have been reconciled against the companion Type-of-Income sheet page 104 (identical asset list/order); merge amounts by asset name downstream.

Asset-name column on this page was at the legibility floor; names adopted from the clearer companion page 104. GS structured-note due dates (rows 5-6: 02/28/2020, 02/20/2020) and the Societe Generale note (row 4, 11/24/2021) remain somewhat uncertain.
